tests.scenario: Meditation session on Motorola G86 device
steps: Launch the app on a Motorola G86 device
Verify the app does not crash or freeze for at least 30 minutes
tests.expected_result: The app does not crash or freeze during the meditation session
tests.notes: Adapted from auto tests; hybrid IDs. Still checks long run without crash.

steps: Launch the app on a Motorola G86 device
Lock and unlock the device multiple times
Minimize and maximize the app multiple times
Verify the app does not crash or freeze
tests.expected_result: The app remains stable and does not crash or freeze
tests.notes: Adapted from auto tests; hybrid IDs. Still checks long run without crash.

tests.scenario: Loading meditation session on compatible device
steps: Launch the app on a compatible device
Measure the time it takes for the session to start playing
tests.expected_result: The meditation session starts playing within 5 seconds
tests.notes: Same 5-second start idea as auto, no big change.

tests.scenario: Loading meditation session on slow device
steps: Launch the app on a slow device
Measure the time it takes for the session to start playing
tests.expected_result: The meditation session starts playing within 5 seconds
tests.notes: Same 5-second start idea as auto, no big change.

tests.scenario: Offline access to downloaded meditation sessions
steps: Access and play a downloaded meditation session
tests.expected_result: The user can access and play the downloaded session for at least 24 hours
tests.notes: Offline downloaded playback—steps mirror the automated version.

steps: Access and play a downloaded meditation session
tests.expected_result: The user can still access and play the downloaded session
tests.notes: Offline downloaded playback—steps mirror the automated version.

steps: Verify the session continues playing for at least 30 minutes
tests.expected_result: The session continues playing without interruption
tests.notes: Lock / minimize playback; followed the auto structure.

steps: Verify the session continues playing for at least 30 minutes
tests.expected_result: The session continues playing without interruption
tests.notes: Lock / minimize playback; followed the auto structure.

steps: Attempt to log in through a linked account with correct credentials
Measure the time it takes to log in successfully
tests.expected_result: The user logs in successfully within 10 seconds
tests.notes: Login without loops; kept the time bound.

steps: Attempt to log in through email with correct credentials
Measure the time it takes to log in successfully
tests.expected_result: The user logs in successfully within 10 seconds
tests.notes: Login without loops; kept the time bound.

steps: Verify a clear message is displayed explaining benefits and costs
tests.expected_result: The message is displayed within 2 seconds
tests.notes: Subscription screen messaging clarity.

steps: View the app's subscription options as a non-subscribed user
Verify a clear message is displayed explaining benefits and costs
tests.expected_result: The message is displayed within 2 seconds
tests.notes: Subscription screen messaging clarity.

tests.expected_result: The user can return to the session and continue from the last playback position within 10 seconds
tests.notes: Resume after leave; expected result matches hybrid spec wording.

tests.scenario: Multiple navigation away from meditation session
steps: Navigate away from the session multiple times
Return to the session each time
tests.expected_result: The user can return to the session and continue from the last playback position within 10 seconds
tests.notes: Resume after leave; expected result matches hybrid spec wording.

steps: Select the option to turn off haptics
tests.expected_result: Haptics are disabled immediately
tests.notes: Turn off haptics from settings—same shape as auto.

tests.expected_result: Haptics remain disabled
tests.notes: Turn off haptics from settings—same shape as auto.

steps: Verify the message explains the cause and at least one concrete next step
tests.expected_result: The message is displayed within 5 seconds and states the cause and includes at least one concrete next step
tests.notes: Stricter error copy; updated steps to match “concrete next step.”

steps: Verify each message explains the cause and at least one concrete next step
tests.expected_result: Each message is displayed within 5 seconds and states the cause and includes at least one concrete next step
tests.notes: Stricter error copy; updated steps to match “concrete next step.”

steps: Observe device notification log for 7 days
tests.expected_result: No promotional push notifications are received for 7 days while the setting stays off
tests.notes: Big change from auto: email-count test replaced with in-app promo notification toggle.

steps: Trigger a promotional campaign if available in test environment
tests.expected_result: Promotional push notifications are only allowed after the user re-enables the setting
tests.notes: Big change from auto: email-count test replaced with in-app promo notification toggle.

steps: Attempt to log in through a linked account with correct credentials
Measure the time it takes to log in successfully

steps: Attempt to log in through a linked account with correct credentials multiple times
